name: Oriental Vegetables and Rice
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Frozen vegetable mixture (broccoli, red sweet pepper, bamboo shoots, and straw mushrooms)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sesame and vegetable oils in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the frozen vegetables; stir-fry for several minutes until they are heated through.
3. Stir in the cooked rice and 1 tablespoon of reduced-sodium soy sauce, then cook and stir until the rice is warmed and the grains have separated slightly.
4. Serve with additional soy sauce on top, if desired.
Each serving provides:
145 calories
4.4 g. protein
3.3 g. fat
24.8 g. carbohydrate
170 mg. sodium
0 mg. cholesterol
Source: Sport Sense - The Common Sense Approach to a Healthful Lifestyle
